channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in Germany
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Germany — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Eden - Du bezahlst für jede Lüge — Joyn Plus
item.description: Joyn Plus · German · Not enough ratings yet — Thirteen singles search for love while lie detector tests challenge their honesty, with every lie reducing a €100,000 jackpot.

item.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 7.7 · Must watch — Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

item.title: The East Palace — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Korean · ★ 7.9 · Must watch — A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

item.title: Heartstopper Forever — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

item.title: Was haben wir gelacht — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Just released — verdict soon — An entire generation of Germans was raised on male comedians. But what about their female counterparts?

item.title: Insects – Hidden Heroes — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Just released — verdict soon — How did our world come into being? Beneath our feet lies a class of animals far more numerous than any other.

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.9 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Ruby Red - But Better! — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Not enough ratings yet — "Ruby Red - But Better!" is a parody of "Ruby Red" Luise Motsch made with her friends for her 26th birthday over 3 days.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.7 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Die Landarztpraxis – Team Sonnenhof — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · German · Not enough ratings yet

item.title: Silo — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Bad Boyfriends - Jetzt wird abgerechnet — RTL+
item.description: RTL+ · German · Not enough ratings yet

item.title: House of the Dragon — WOW
item.description: WOW · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Toy Story 5 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.4 · Worth a watch — When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they…
